case_title: ALFREDO PUENTES VS. HARRY ESTRADA M.

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE (SUBSTITUTED) ON DEFT HARRY ESTRADA ON FBERUARY 1, 2008. (SERVICE FEE $50.00)
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY PUENTES, ALFREDO AS TO DEFENDANT ESTRADA, HARRY M. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-26-2008 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PUENTES, ALFREDO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ESTRADA, HARRY M. $2,855.72 PRINCIPAL, $127.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,983.22, THE COURT DETERMINES PLAINTIFF'S DAMAGES FOR PROPERTY DAMAGE AND LOSS OF USE TO BE $12,928.34; DEFENDANT IS ENTITLED TO CREDIT FOR PREVIOUS PAYMENTS TOTALING $10,072.62. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
COPYING FEES PAID BY PLAINTIFF PUENTES, ALFREDO
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED FEB-01-2008, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ESTRADA, HARRY M.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-26-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-26-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. EXHIBITS FROM PLAINTIFF RETAINED ONLY. CLERK: CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-26-2008 - JUDGMENT.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2008 ORDERED DESTROYED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT ESTRADA, HARRY M.
